# Moderaterna tappar stort i Novus senaste undersökning: "Fastnat i baksätet"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-21  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode is entirely focused on Swedish domestic politics ahead of the September election, featuring Novus chairman Torbjörn Sjöström discussing polling trends: a dramatic decline for the Moderates, gains for the Social Democrats (S) and Sweden Democrats (SD), and the dominance of energy/electricity prices, security (NATO accession), and general uncertainty over specific policy issues. No publicly traded equities or investment theses are discussed.
